steps.title: Identify what the question needs
steps.content: The notes state that Discoglossus nigriventer was identified in Israel in 2011. The answer must include both the organism and its location — Israel — to satisfy the question's goal.

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• "In 2015, a living specimen of Dysphania pusilla was found in New Zealand.": focuses on a different organism rather than Discoglossus nigriventer. ✗
  • "Previously believed to be extinct, a living specimen of Discoglossus nigriventer was identified in Israel.": names Discoglossus nigriventer and specifies it was identified in Israel. ✓
  • "Examples of Lazarus species can be found in Discoglossus nigriventer as well as Dysphania pusilla.": describes a general concept without stating where the organism was identified. ✗
  • "A living specimen of Discoglossus nigriventer, once believed to be extinct, was identified in 2011.": includes the year 2011 but leaves out the required location. ✗
That matches the correct answer — B is correct.
